economic_notes: Government business enterprises include Wahgoshig Resources Limited Partnership (forestry/resources), Little Fox Lodge Limited Partnership (lodge), Niiwin Limited Partnership, Wahgoshig Energy LP (energy), and Kisis Aki Energy Inc. Investment in Wahgoshig Energy LP of $466,765 made during year.
notes: Nine government business enterprises accounted for using modified equity method. Share of loss in GBEs of $581,056 recorded in 2021. Other revenue of $10,413,847 is very large relative to government transfers - likely includes resource revenue and other own-source income. Wahgoshig Resources LP had revenues of $2,833,629 but a loss of $299,041 for year. Write-down of investments of $3,347,384 recorded in prior year (2020) related to 48North Cannabis Corp. Community Property expense category also present. No remuneration schedule visible in provided pages.
